---
title: "synapse_sync.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\expansion_test_new\.agents\scripts\synapse_sync.py"
loc: 213
complexity: 39
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.68
intel_score: 2.75
overall_score: 1.00
---

## Intent
The `synapse_sync.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, Synapse, __init__, _load_config, _git_cmd, pull, _validate_skill, push, main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_bottom, Synapse, __init__, _load_config, _git_cmd, pull, _validate_skill, push, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [py_compile](file://py_compile)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [scripts.ui](file://scripts.ui)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_bottom`
- `Synapse`
- `__init__`
- `_load_config`
- `_git_cmd`
- `pull`
- `_validate_skill`
- `push`
- `main`
